ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-18-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Duncan for and with Linda McHugh (Personal Representative).
Konstantine Demiris for Probate Advance Inheritance.

Mr. Duncan stated that there is nothing to add to his petition and that there is an estate for Carl Smith (PES-19-303391). Mr. Demiris stated that everything in his Client's petition is resolved, that he believes the issue of the assignments will be resolved in that (Carl's) estate, that notice was given, that no one is here and that the money is in the possession of his Client. The First and Final Account and Report of Personal Representative, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-29-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Duncan for and with Linda McHugh.
Diana Redding appeared by telephone for Kevin Evans.

Mr. Duncan and Ms. Redding stated that there is no opposition. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $1,745,000.00 is required. Status on close of estate is set for April 28, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported
